publicationStmt.publisher: Schenker Documents Online in association with the Centre for Computing in the Humanities

sourceDesc.p: No source: created in electronic format.

encodingDesc.p: Encoding according to the CCH TEI Guidelines

div.p: Daughter of Reinhard Oppel and his fourth wife, Elfriede Oppel (née Dey); eighth child of Reinhard Oppel.

Brigitte was born in Leipzig, where after many years of commuting Reinhard had succeeded in acquiring an apartment. Brigitte and her older brother, Kurt, are mentioned occasionally in the correspondence between Reinhard and Heinrich Schenker, e.g. “My wife and the children are well. I here enclose a few photographs of Brigitte, who was one year old on June 2” (OJ 13/10, [168], June 14, 1933).

Three photographs survive: OJ 72/11, item 4a, showing Brigitte and Kurt side-by-side, inscribed on the reverse: “Summer 1938”; OJ 72/11, item 4b with Kurt and Brigitte standing among flowers, inscribed: “June 12, 1935 / Bepo 4½, Brigitte 3 years old”; and OJ 72/11, item 7, showing Reinhard with Kurt and Brigitte standing at his sides, dated “Summer 1938.”
